seeds.value: Define your social media goals here. Example: LinkedIn: 5% engagement rate, 500 new followers/month. Twitter: 3% engagement rate, daily presence. YouTube: 1 video/week, 1000 views average. Overall: drive 20% of marketing qualified leads from social.
seeds.description: Social media KPIs per platform -- used to evaluate content performance and set posting strategy

seeds.value: All social content must align with brand voice. Stay professional. Technical accuracy required. Include call-to-action on product posts. Use approved hashtags. Flag engagement drops >20% for immediate review.
seeds.description: Content creation and publishing guidelines for social media
